title: CityCraft - 1.20.1
description: Originally Trafficraft, prepare to reload your world!
body:
I don't know how i back, but i back.

Hello to CityCraft, or Trafficraft, your mod of companie and trains!
This mod add a mini train, the mini train will spawn in two places, in a mini city, or naturally in any plains, the citys will spawn in plains, and forest, well, lets start with the interesting information!

There are two trains, the old Train, green and slow, and the citizen train, normal, you can tame any train, in future will add more trains.

In moment, i created a new model, the model have gradient.

Download if you wanna, if do you dislike this, i will make nothing.
